display.purpose: The person's name in the hero. Fraunces only.

headline.purpose: Section headings and the large Contact email link.

title.purpose: Item-level headings: job role + company, project names, degree.

body.purpose: Taglines, descriptions, skill lists. Capped near 65ch.

label.purpose: Hero role line and skill group labels in Legible Tan; nav links and footer copy.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Once-per-section scroll reveal via IntersectionObserver; gated behind prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: theme-fade
motion.purpose: Light/dark theme switch on body and header.

motion.name: lenis-scroll
motion.purpose: Page scrolling; disabled entirely under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single filled action on the page — Download CV. Ink pill, paper text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; background: var(--ink, #1a1a1a); color: var(--bg, #faf7f2); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #a0764b); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Underline Link
components.description: The default secondary affordance — soft text, hairline underline, accent underline on hover.
components.css: .ds-link { color: var(--muted, #6b6459); font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: var(--line, #e5dfd4); text-underline-offset: 4px; transition: color 0.15s ease, text-decoration-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-link:hover, .ds-link:focus-visible { color: var(--ink, #1a1a1a); text-decoration-color: var(--accent, #a0764b); } .ds-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #a0764b); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Section Heading
components.description: Fraunces headline with a single accent em-dash mark — the only section marker in the system.
components.css: .ds-section-heading { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: var(--ink, #1a1a1a); margin: 0; } .ds-section-mark { color: var(--accent, #a0764b); margin-right: 0.75rem; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Sticky translucent paper bar with backdrop blur, hairline bottom border, soft links that ink on hover.
components.html:
Hazem Lenin
  • About
  • Experience
  • Projects
  • Contact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg, #faf7f2) 80%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line, #e5dfd4); } .ds-nav-name { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.125rem; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: var(--ink, #1a1a1a); text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 1.25rem; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-links a { color: var(--muted, #6b6459); font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-links a:hover, .ds-nav-links a:focus-visible { color: var(--ink, #1a1a1a); }

components.name: Skills Row
components.description: Definition-list row: Legible Tan group label, soft dot-joined values, hairline dividers — the anti-card-grid.
components.html:
Backend
.NET Core · CQRS · SignalR · Django
Frontend
Angular · React · Vue.js · Next.js
components.css: .ds-skills { margin: 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--line, #e5dfd4); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line, #e5dfd4); font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-skills-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 8rem 1fr; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 1rem 0; } .ds-skills-row + .ds-skills-row { border-top: 1px solid var(--line, #e5dfd4); } .ds-skills-row dt { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.025em; color: var(--accent-text, #8f6440); } .ds-skills-row dd { margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.625; color: var(--muted, #6b6459); }

components.name: Timeline Entry
components.description: Signature experience treatment: hairline left spine, accent dot, Fraunces title, soft metadata.
components.html:
1. Full-Stack Engineer · GAMP Ltd

    2021 — Present
components.css: .ds-timeline { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0 0 0 2rem; border-left: 1px solid var(--line, #e5dfd4); } .ds-timeline-item { position: relative; } .ds-timeline-dot { position: absolute; left: -2.35rem; top: 0.4rem; width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--accent, #a0764b); } .ds-timeline-item h3 { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: var(--ink, #1a1a1a); margin: 0; } .ds-timeline-period { font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--muted, #6b6459); margin: 0.25rem 0 0; }

narrative.overview: This is a single page meant to be read, not scanned past. Warm paper tones, a serif display face, and hairline dividers give it the quiet confidence of a well-set personal essay rather than a marketing site. Nothing here is trying to convert a visitor with urgency; it's trying to earn attention through precision — tight type, deliberate spacing, one accent color used sparingly as a signature rather than a decoration. The system explicitly rejects the generic AI-portfolio template: no gradient text, no uppercase eyebrow labels, no numbered scaffolding, no icon-card grids, no hero-metric stat blocks. Sections are separated by hairline rules and generous vertical rhythm, not by cards or boxed containers. Depth comes from color and line weight, never from shadow.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper background in light mode, warm near-black in dark mode — never pure white or pure black
Fraunces serif for display moments only (name, section titles, item headings, email); Inter for everything functional
One accent color (warm terracotta-tan) used only for labels, marks, timeline dots, and hover states — never for large surfaces
Fully flat: no shadows, no elevation, no glass
A single em-dash (—) as the section marker, replacing eyebrow labels or numbering
One photograph: the circular hero portrait with a hairline border — the page's only imagery
Lucide icons (20px, stroke-width 1.5) as the only iconography

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Terracotta-tan appears only on labels, marks, underlines, timeline dots, and hover states — never as a fill on any element larger than an icon or a few words of text. Its scarcity is what makes it read as a signature, not a theme color.

rules.name: The Legible Accent Rule
rules.body: Accent-colored text at body/label sizes always uses accent-text (#8f6440), never raw accent (#a0764b) — the base accent fails AA contrast on paper. Non-text accent uses (marks, dots, underline decorations, selection) keep the base accent.

rules.name: The Warm-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral (paper, ink, soft, line) shares the same warm hue lean in both light and dark mode. Don't introduce a cool gray anywhere in the system; it will read as mismatched against the serif/paper aesthetic.

rules.name: The Serif-Only-For-Weight Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is reserved for moments that carry visual weight (name, section titles, item headings, the contact email). Never use it for body copy, labels, or navigation — Inter carries all of that.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Never add box-shadow to any component. If a surface needs to read as 'above' another, use a hairline border or a background-color shift instead.

dos: Do keep every neutral warm-hued (paper, ink, soft, line) in both light and dark mode — that warmth is the brand, not an accident.
Do use the accent sparingly: marks, timeline dots, underline hovers, selection color. If accent starts covering more than a small fraction of any screen, pull it back.
Do use accent-text (#8f6440) for any accent-colored text at body/label sizes — raw accent fails AA on paper.
Do use hairline borders (line) and background contrast for all separation and depth. Flat is the rule.
Do reserve Fraunces serif for name, section headings, item headings, and the contact email — the highest-weight moments only.
Do default to underlined text links for secondary actions; reserve the single filled pill button for the one primary action (CV download).
Do gate all motion (Lenis, reveals, theme transitions) behind prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference, with content visible by default.
donts: Don't add box-shadows, glassmorphism, or any glow/elevation effect — this system is fully flat by design (the nav's backdrop-blur is the single sanctioned exception).
Don't add gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient) anywhere.
Don't add uppercase tracked eyebrow labels above section headings, or numbered markers (01/02/03) — the single accent-colored em dash is the only section marker this system uses.
Don't build icon+heading+text card grids for skills, projects, or experience — use hairline-divided lists or the timeline treatment instead.
Don't introduce a cream/sand/beige tint beyond the already-committed paper tone — don't lighten or desaturate further 'for elegance.'
Don't pair Fraunces with any other serif, or Inter with any other geometric/humanist sans — the pairing is fixed.
Don't set text in raw accent (#a0764b) on paper at sizes below 24px — it fails WCAG AA (~3.79:1). Use accent-text.
Don't add a second photograph or decorative imagery — the hero portrait is the page's only image; typography and rhythm carry the rest.
